tabpfn.rationale: L18 (77% depth). Mean critical layer 17.4±4.4 across 51 TabArena datasets with corrected preprocessing (DataFrames, proper categoricals). TabPFN classifier has 24 layers; regressor has 18.

tabicl.rationale: L9 (76% depth). Mean critical layer 9.9±1.8 across 38 classification datasets. TabICL v1 is classification-only; use tabicl_v2 for regression.

tabicl_v2.rationale: L11 (89% depth). Mean critical layer 11.6±0.9 across all 51 TabArena datasets (cls+reg) with corrected preprocessing. Low std indicates consistent behaviour across tasks.

mitra.rationale: L11 (90% depth). Mean critical layer 11.7±1.3 across all 51 TabArena datasets (cls+reg) with corrected preprocessing. Classification and regression converge to the same optimal layer.

tabdpt.rationale: L13 (84% depth). Mean critical layer 14.2±1.8 across all 51 TabArena datasets (cls+reg) with corrected preprocessing.

carte.rationale: L1 (36% depth). CARTE is a shallow 5-layer model; representation diverges early. Mean critical layer 1.8±1.3 across 51 datasets with corrected preprocessing.

hyperfast.rationale: L1 (67% depth). HyperFast has only 3 layers; critical layer is always L2 (zero variance across 38 classification datasets). Classification-only model.

tabula8b.rationale: L13 (41% depth). Mean critical layer 13.7±13.2 across 51 datasets with corrected preprocessing. High std (13 layers) reflects genuine dataset-to-dataset variability in this LLM-based model; treat optimal layer with caution.
